title: Kimco Realty Corp. (KIM) CEO Conor Flynn on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Kimco Realty Corp. (NYSE:KIM ) Q2 2022 Results Conference Call July 28, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants David Bujnicki - SVP, IR & Strategy Conor Flynn - CEO Ross Cooper - President, CIO Glenn Cohen - CFO Dave Jamieson - COO Conference Call Participants Craig Schmidt - Bank of America Adam Kramer - Morgan Stanley Alex Goldfarb - Piper Sandler Greg McGinniss - Scotiabank Michael Bilerman - Citi Samir Khanal - Evercore ISI Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Michael Goldsmith - UBS Haendel St. Juste - Mizuho Floris Van Dijkum - Compass Point Mike Mueller - JP Morgan Anthony Powell - Barclays Derek Johnston - Deutsche Bank Ki Bin Kim - Truist Linda Tsai - Jefferies Tayo Okusanya - Credit Suisse Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Kimco Realty Corporation's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Kimco Realty® Announces Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, including mixed-use assets, today reported results for the second quarter ended June 30, 2022. For the three months ended June 30, 2022 and 2021, Kimco's net (loss)/income available to the company's common shareholders per diluted share was ($0.21) and $0.25, respectively. Second Quarter Highlights: Produced Funds From Operations*

title: Is a Beat in Store for Kimco Realty (KIM) in Q2 Earnings?
text: Kimco Realty's (KIM) Q2 results are likely to benefit from its premium properties, grocery-anchored centers and gains from the continued demand recovery.

title: Kimco Realty® Publishes 2021 Corporate Responsibility Report
text: JERICHO, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Kimco Realty® (NYSE: KIM), North America's largest publicly traded owner and operator of open-air, grocery-anchored shopping centers, including mixed-use assets, announced today the release of its 2021 Corporate Responsibility Report. This ninth annual report details the company's performance in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) areas. 2021 Report Highlights Now over a decade since the launch of Kimco's formalized efforts around ESG and the hire of its

title: Kimco Realty: Secure A Safe And Growing 4% Dividend Check
text: Kimco Realty's lease spreads and rents per square foot are increasing, giving more pricing power to mall operators. Kimco Realty increased its dividend twice lately, increasing the stock yield to almost 4.0%.
